content:
IVX IA CHAT ROOM — INDEPENDENT DEPLOYMENT EXECUTOR AUDIT

Repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION:
Audit and finish IVX IA Chat Room as an independent senior deployment executor.

No narrative.
No placeholders.
No fake verified.
Audit tools, execute tests, confirm capability, and return evidence.

CURRENT DEPLOYMENT EVIDENCE:
- GitHub SHA: 939c9652...
- Render Deploy ID: dep-d92qth37...
- Render Status: live
- Health SHA: 939c9652...
- Commit Match: YES
- 16 features verified
- Investor Dashboard: AUTH_REQUIRED

TASK 1 — TOOL CAPABILITY AUDIT

Verify IVX IA Chat has working tools for:

1. GitHub read repo
2. GitHub push/write
3. GitHub commit history
4. GitHub workflow status
5. Render service status
6. Render deploy trigger
7. Render deploy logs
8. Render rollback
9. Supabase table audit
10. Supabase migration check
11. Supabase read/write test
12. Production /health check
13. Production /version check
14. Commit match verification
15. Feature smoke tests
16. Watchdog trace logs
17. QA pipeline
18. Evidence archive
19. 5-hour executive report
20. Owner approval gate

For each return:
TOOL:
STATUS: VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED / UNVERIFIED
EVIDENCE:
ERROR:

TASK 2 — IVX IA DEPLOYMENT COMMANDS

Confirm these commands work inside IVX IA Chat:

/deploy-status
/deploy-now
/deploy-evidence
/deploy-verify
/deploy-rollback
/qa-production
/qa-chat
/qa-members
/qa-landing
/qa-engagement
/commit-match
/supabase-audit
/render-status
/github-status
/watchdog

For each command return:
COMMAND:
HTTP_STATUS:
RAW_RESPONSE:
STATUS:

TASK 3 — SENIOR DEVELOPER BRAIN CHECK

Verify IVX IA can independently:

- identify stale production
- detect commit mismatch
- locate failed route
- fix backend route registration
- run tests
- commit code
- trigger deploy
- verify production
- detect auth-required routes
- avoid fake evidence
- mark unknown items UNVERIFIED
- retry failed deployments
- create rollback plan
- produce raw evidence report

Return:
CAPABILITY:
STATUS:
EVIDENCE:

TASK 4 — LIVE DEPLOYMENT SIMULATION

Run a safe no-op deployment verification cycle:

1. Read GitHub SHA
2. Read Render SHA
3. Read /health SHA
4. Read /version SHA
5. Compare commit match
6. Run smoke tests
7. Save evidence
8. Return report

Do not change production unless required.

TASK 5 — CHAT ROOM QA

Verify IVX IA Chat:

- sends message
- receives AI response
- saves message
- reloads conversation
- opens last conversation automatically
- watchdog reaches UI_UPDATED
- no AI_TRIGGER_DECISION timeout
- no false “could not read response”
- deployment commands work from chat

TASK 6 — FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

Return:

REPO:
BRANCH:
CURRENT_GITHUB_SHA:
CURRENT_RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
CURRENT_RENDER_SHA:
CURRENT_HEALTH_SHA:
CURRENT_VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
TOOLS_VERIFIED:
TOOLS_FAILED:
COMMANDS_VERIFIED:
COMMANDS_FAILED:
CHAT_QA_STATUS:
WATCHDOG_STATUS:
DEPLOYMENT_EXECUTOR_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_BRAIN_STATUS:
AUTH_REQUIRED_ITEMS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:
VERIFIED
FAILED
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if IVX IA Chat can independently audit, deploy, verify, report evidence, and avoid fake/placeholder claims.
